title: Fly Zapper Electric Indoor,Powerful 3500V &20W UV Killer Electric, Bug Zapper Indoor Insect Trap,Washable Tray and Hanging Chain Suitable for Bedroom,Living room,Dining Room (3500V Fly Zapper)

description:
Our electric fly killers for the home delivers an eco-friendly and chemical-free solution for mosquito control and indoor pest elimination. Featuring a high-efficiency UV fly killer lamp with dual-light technology, it attracts fruit flies, gnats, and mosquitoes using a powerful 3500V grid, ensuring fast and effective extermination.
Designed for residential, hotel, and restaurant use, this fly killer electric device provides silent operation and child-safe use with its mesh guard. Easy to clean with a removable trap tray. This fly zapper electric perfectly blends into any room, making it an ideal electric fly trap for kitchens and living areas.
Whether you need a purple light fly killer indoor or a compact electric fly killer for home pest management, this model guarantees outstanding performance without fumes or chemicals. Experience premium fly and mosquito control with a safe, quiet, and energy-efficient fly light—the perfect choice for anyone seeking reliable indoor pest extermination.
